title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the wrapper infrastructure around a model from the model itself, focusing on the 98% that is harness rather than model. It operates at two levels: an AI layer for single sessions with rules and hooks, and multi-session orchestration for scaling reliable agentic workflows.
